# stremio_continue_watching (Data Source)

Reads continue watching entries for the authenticated account from library item state in Stremio datastore.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "stremio_continue_watching" "current" {
  limit = 25
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Optional maximum number of continue watching entries to return.

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) Continue watching entries returned by Stremio. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))
- `id` (String) Static identifier for this data source instance.

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `duration` (Number) Content duration in seconds when available.
- `entry_id` (String) Entry identifier when available.
- `last_watched` (String) Timestamp of last watch activity when available.
- `name` (String) Display name/title when available.
- `progress` (Number) Watch progress percent when available.
- `raw_json` (String) Raw JSON object for this entry.
- `time_offset` (Number) Playback position offset in seconds when available.
- `time_watched` (Number) Total watched time in seconds when available.
- `times_watched` (Number) Number of times watched when available.
- `type` (String) Content type when available (for example `movie` or `series`).
- `video_id` (String) Video identifier from entry state when available.
